message:
Fix bugs found during code review

- message-content.tsx: Fix code fence parsing to handle trailing whitespace
  by trimming lines before regex matching (lines like "```typescript  "
  or "```  " now work correctly)

- message-detail.tsx: Add missing 'group' class to parent container so
  CopyButton's group-hover:opacity-100 actually triggers on hover

- copy-button.tsx: Fix variable shadowing where catch(error) was shadowing
  the error() toast function, causing TypeScript error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
